title: LuhTech Service Graph
description: Portfolio-level graph container. Holds the complete registry of service nodes, venture edges, and equity instruments for the LuhTech Holdings portfolio. This is the single source of truth for what every venture draws, what every SME has contributed, and what the holding company's shared pool is worth. Generated by the service-graph-rollup transform — never edited manually. The graph structure enables associative value calculation: a domain expert contributing to Ectropy who also benefits JobsiteControl via knowledge transfer has edges to both, and the graph makes that visible and priceable.

graphId.description: The canonical portfolio graph URN. There is one graph for the portfolio. Venture-specific sub-graphs are views of this graph, not separate graphs.

version.description: Semver version of this graph snapshot. Incremented each time the graph is regenerated by the transform pipeline.

nodes.description: Registry of all service nodes. Keyed by serviceId URN. Each value conforms to service-node.schema.v1.0.json.

edges.description: Registry of all venture edges. Keyed by edgeId URN. Each value conforms to venture-edge.schema.v1.0.json.

instruments.description: Registry of all equity instruments. Keyed by instrumentId URN. Each value conforms to equity-instrument.schema.v1.0.json. T2 sensitivity — this block is excluded from public graph views.

poolSummary.description: Portfolio-level pool health summary. The holding company's shared resource pool expressed as a single dashboard-ready block.

totalNodes.description: Total number of registered service nodes across all types.

nodesByType.description: Count of active nodes by serviceType.

platformUSF.description: Portfolio-level USF score — the weighted average USF across all active agent nodes. This is the number on the CEO dashboard KPI card.

score.description: Weighted average USF. Formula: sum(node.usf.score × node.usf.quality) / sum(node.usf.quality) for all active agent nodes.

poolValue.description: Economic value of the shared pool. Basis for holding company valuation beyond direct venture equity stakes.

totalAllocatedYTD.description: Total USD value allocated from the pool to ventures year-to-date. Sum of all edge ledger allocatedValue records in the current year.

unrealizedPoolValue.description: Estimated strategic value of the pool independent of current allocations. Reflects the option value of having pre-competitive technology available to all future ventures. Set by Erik annually as a calibrated estimate.

associativeValueSummary.description: Graph-level associative value — value created by connections between nodes beyond direct USF scores. This is what makes the graph model richer than a flat ledger.

crossVentureKnowledgeTransfers.description: Count of graph edges where knowledgeTransferRate > 0 — services contributing value to ventures beyond their primary assignment.

highValueClusters.description: Clusters of nodes with high associative value — where multiple services reinforce each other's effectiveness. Identified by graph analysis.

allocationLedger.description: Portfolio-level P&L allocation summary. Rolled up from all venture-edge ledgers by the transform pipeline. The basis for the holding company's internal transfer pricing.

byVenture.description: Allocation summary keyed by ventureId. How much of the shared pool has each venture consumed, by quarter.

poolSharePercent.description: This venture's draw as a percentage of total pool allocation YTD.

byServiceType.description: Allocation summary by service type. How is the pool being consumed — mostly agents, mostly CoE time, or mostly infra?

lastRollup.description: Timestamp of last transform-driven ledger rollup.

smeRoster.description: Portfolio-wide SME and CoE founder roster derived from coe-time service nodes and equity instruments. This is the team behind the team — the domain experts who make the accelerator model real.

meta.description: Provenance block. Graph is a DERIVED ARTIFACT — do not edit manually. Regenerate using luhtech-transform service-graph-rollup.

sourceHash.description: SHA-256 hashes of source files. Enables stale detection without file comparison.

x-luhtech.dashboardSurface: /ceo Command Center → Agent Coverage panel → Service Graph tab
x-luhtech.investorSurface: invest.luh.tech → Pool Overview (T1 fields only — instruments excluded)
